note: Claude writes this file. Never edit manually. Stop hook enforces freshness.

items.note: FIXED 2026-06-26 — Combine sink added to PetOwnerScheduleViewModel.init(); objectWillChange.send() + generateBookingInsights() fire on each Firestore snapshot. Commit pending.

5 functions written but not deployed. Run: firebase deploy --only functions:midVisitCheckIn,functions:onChatMessageCreated,functions:notifyOwnerOnVisitStatusChange,functions:onChangeRequestCreated,functions:onTimeOffRequestCreated && firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes
Square code deployed but end-to-end never run. Test: book → pay test card 4532 0151 2535 3010 → Square Dashboard → invoice → refund → auditLog
No booking confirmation email fires on booking.created. Owner has no idea booking was created.
Email verification has no retry queue. Transient SMTP failures (~1-2%) leave users stuck at signup.

CRITICAL — actively broken in production. 4 lookups still query users/ directly: SitterDataFetcher, BookingDetailViewModel, ChatViewModelDisplayName (x2), RecurringBookingService. Shows 'Unable to load sitters' + 'User {uid}' bugs. Root cause: firestore.rules commit 67bc1b4 removed petSitter read exception — owners can no longer read users/{sitterId}. iOS reference: commit d62aeb6e5. Fix: replace all 4 with publicProfiles lookups. List query needs both bizId and role constraints.

firestore.rules: removed sameBizId() from isAdmin() list condition. sameBizId() references resource.data.bizId which Firestore denies without a matching query constraint — was breaking ALL web-admin user queries. Deploy: firebase deploy --only firestore:rules
GPSConsentService.kt + GPSConsentSheet code complete. Runtime device verification not done. visitTracking writes are blocked without consent (Firestore rule: commit d5fec7e).

Phase 7 P3 code complete (commits 9e313c6 + 39fa994). Runtime pending: spot-check new booking bizId in Firestore; verify reschedule and time-off docs created from device; verify invoice FCM push opens correctly.
Pushed. Commit 4035386fe is live on origin/main.
Unstaged change in ServiceCards.swift (Picker → chip scrollview for transport service type). Pre-existing, not part of P2/P3/P4. Needs its own commit.
syncPublicProfile trigger doesn't sync directMessaging.allowOwnerChats. iOS defaults to true if absent — safe but silent divergence if sitter disables messaging. LOW priority.

Run on 2026-07-22 or after: delete clients/ collection, remove rules, remove index entries, delete functions/src/features/clients/, remove 5 exports from index.ts. Phase 7 pre-flight checks all PASSED.
visitTracking create gated on visitTrackingConsent/{uid}.consentGiven==true in Firestore rules.
backfillGpsTtl onCall CF deployed. All 16 pre-TTL visitTracking docs confirmed stamped with expireAt.
Firebase Console: 7-day PITR + 98-day daily snapshots enabled.
DISASTER_RECOVERY.md authored in savipets-backend/. 6 failure scenarios.
4 Cloud Monitoring alert policies live: error rate, p99, Firestore reads, auth failures.
participantNames map written at conversation create (iOS commit 28943d9ca). Android reads in MessageListenerManager.kt. Web-admin reads in all 4 mapper sites.
Backend writes claimsUpdatedAt (commit 4ecf8d4). iOS TokenRefreshManager subscribes (commit 28943d9ca). Android TokenRefreshManagerImpl mirrors it (commits 9e313c6, 39fa994).
deleteUserData CF deployed (commit 67de80f). iOS deleteAccountViaCF() wired (commit 28943d9ca). Android OwnerProfileViewModel calls CF.
Direct SMTP in all 4 invite paths. No Firebase Email Extension dependency.
iOS migrated to publicProfiles for all cross-user lookups. Android still PENDING (ANDROID-PUBPROFILES).

onPetNameChanged trigger written — patches pets[] on pending/scheduled/approved bookings when pets/{id}.name changes. Completed/cancelled keep historical name. functions/src/features/pets/triggers/onPetNameChanged.ts. Deploy: firebase deploy --only functions:onPetNameChanged
Already fixed in code — getSitterName() called at lines 58, 242; sitterName written at lines 71, 110, 254, 343. Verified code reads match. Cross-repo TODO was stale.

Single admin booking (createAdminBooking) now derives + writes scheduledTime string ("h:mm a" via toLocaleTimeString en-US) so iOS BookingCardInline.swift:20 shows the time instead of 'at '. Recurring path already wrote it. Verified: pets already stored as names (extractPetNames) — empty avatars in repro = admin didn't pick pets, not a bug. serviceType slug IS the correct architecture — iOS must map it (see IOS-BOOKING-CARD-SLUG). tsc -b passes.

SUPERSEDED by SERVICENAME-SPLIT schema. Admin bookings render raw serviceType slug ('dog-walking') as card title — BookingCardInline.swift:16 prints booking.serviceType verbatim. Fix: (1) WRITE — store catalog SLUG in serviceType + snapshot catalog name into new serviceName field at booking create (BookingCRUDService.swift:43, catalog BookingModels.swift:96); (2) READ — render serviceName ?? humanize(serviceType), idempotent resolver handles all legacy doc classes without migration. Design: savipets-web-admin/docs/architecture/SERVICE_NAMING.md. Full detail in CROSS_REPO_TODOS.md.

Schema split serviceType (machine key/slug) + serviceName (frozen display snapshot). web-admin writes both on create (booking, recurring series, recurring bookings, visits/{id}); reads via resolveServiceName(booking) helper at all display sites (table, drawer, daysheet, calendar, list, timeline, my-schedule, invoices summary + modal line items). Design doc: docs/architecture/SERVICE_NAMING.md. tsc -b clean, 427 tests pass.

Mirror serviceType+serviceName split. WRITE: slug to serviceType + snapshot catalog name to serviceName at booking create (FirebaseBookingRepository.createBooking, RecurringSeriesRepositoryImpl). READ: serviceName ?? humanize(serviceType) at all booking display sites. Design: savipets-web-admin/docs/architecture/SERVICE_NAMING.md.

(1) Document serviceType+serviceName split in PLATFORM_ARCHITECTURE.md + contracts.md; field rule: serviceName immutable after create (frozen snapshot). (2) One-time backfill CF for Class-2 docs (serviceType is a human label, not ^[a-z0-9-]+$): set serviceName=label then serviceType=slugify via catalog; idempotent, skip docs with serviceName. Dirty analytics = sales problem, required. (3) Square/invoice line-item descriptions must read serviceName ?? humanize(serviceType). Design: savipets-web-admin/docs/architecture/SERVICE_NAMING.md.
